![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mleatherbrush1-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERBRUSH

## Interior / Accessories

### A fully natural, safe leather brush with an ergonomically designed handle.

Q²M LeatherBrush is designed for safe and effective cleaning of all types of automotive leather. It combines natural horsehair bristles with a wooden handle shaped for comfort and control during regular leather maintenance.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leatherbrush_2020-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is Q²M LeatherBrush designed for? 

Cleaning and maintaining all types of automotive leather.

02
Is it safe on delicate leather? 

Yes, the natural horsehair bristles are gentle and safe.

03
Does the handle scratch interior surfaces? 

No, the handle has rounded edges to prevent damage.

04
Can it be used with any leather cleaner? 

Yes, it is compatible with all leather cleaning products.

05
Is it comfortable to use when wet? 

Yes, the handle is shaped to provide a good grip even when wet.

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
